summary: Critical: Task requires TDD with Pester tests and mock fixtures; none provided. Workflow doesn't execute tests (no Invoke-Pester step, no test file) or set up preconditions (VERSION file, git commits). Script assumes VERSION exists and conventional commits are present, causing workflow to fail in act. Missing 60% of explicit requirements: .Tests.ps1, test fixtures, test setup in workflow, output assertions. PowerShell script itself is competent (Set-StrictMode, error handling, modular functions) but not testable—no mocking support, hard-coded expectations, main section tightly coupled to git state. Error handling for 'git log' ($LASTEXITCODE check) is post-command but unclear. Workflow lacks job dependencies, fails fast without meaningful diagnostics. Unusable as-is.
